message.ae2utility.encode_failed_no_term: AE2 Utility: no connected ME terminal or wireless terminal found.
message.ae2utility.encode_failed_empty: AE2 Utility: recipe has no inputs or outputs.
message.ae2utility.encode_failed_no_blan: Cannot encode: no blank pattern found in terminal slot, inventory or ME network.
Cannot encode %1$s, no blank pattern available.
message.ae2utility.encode_failed_no_netw: AE2 Utility: no ME network available for EAEP upload.
message.ae2utility.encode_eaep_provider_: AE2 Utility: pattern %1$s queued, select a provider in the EAEP screen.
message.ae2utility.encode_eaep_pending_f: AE2 Utility: EAEP provider queue failed, pattern returned to inventory.
message.ae2utility.encode_rejected_requi: AE2 Utility: this server requires an open pattern-encoding ME menu to encode (see server config).
message.ae2utility.no_terminal_link: AE2 Utility: the terminal is not linked to a usable ME network.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_none: No encodable recipes in this scope.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_session_: A JEI batch upload is already running.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_cancelle: Cancelled the remaining JEI batch upload queue.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_sent: Sent batch encode request for %s recipe(s) (existing patterns are skipped automatically).
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_bl: Blue highlighted items can be autocrafted.
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_sh: Hold Shift to map/upload the pattern to a provider
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_page: Batch encode all recipes visible on this page
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_cate: Batch encode all recipes in this JEI category (every page)
ae2utility.config.allowJeiPatternEncodeW: Allow JEI pattern encode without open terminal

On (default): carrying a wireless encoding terminal in inventory/curios is enough to use JEI pattern encode.
Off: an open pattern-encoding ME menu is required, reducing lag.
